title: Zarba Respack
description: A resourcepack based on Rainbowpixel, it has a datepack of Rainbowpixel.It also has redstone display.
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/987f13cbff8f0d384237a68830006c4b406a4d58.png) **Attention: This resourcepack will stop updating from April 2025 due to the encryption of the RainbowPixel** # **Zarba Respack** **A resoucepack based on RainbowPixel** | Resourcepack | Latest Ver. | Minecraft Ver. | Optifine | | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Zarba Base | 1.2 | 1.21.3 | Required | | Zarba GUI | 2.0 | 1.21.x | Not required | | Zarba 3D | 1.0 | 1.21.x | Not required | | Minecraft Ver. | Zarba Base | Zarba GUI | Zarba 3D | | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | 1.21.x | Available | Available | Available |

**Dedicated to players who enjoy using the Rainbowpixel Resourcepack**
# **How to import Zarba Resourcepack** 1. Open your Minecraft 2. Click `Option` 3. Click `Resource Packs` 4. Drag the Zarba Resourcepack into the window or click `Open Pack Folder` and copy the Zarba Resourcepack to that folder. **Notes** 1. They are avalible at [Zecoar Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zecoar-modpack) [(EX)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zecoar-modpack-ex) 2. Zarba Base require Optifine, if you are using Fabric, please install Optifabric or any mods that can instead of Optifabric. ———————————————————————————————————————————————————— ![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/987f13cbff8f0d384237a68830006c4b406a4d58.png) **注意：该材质包从2025年4月起停止更新，原因是彩虹像素被加密** # **Zarba 材质包** **一款基于 彩虹像素 的材质包** | 材质包 | 最新版本 | 我的世界版本 | Optifine | | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Zarba Base | 1.2 | 1.21.3 | 需要 | | Zarba GUI | 2.0 | 1.21.x | 不需要 | | Zarba 3D | 1.0 | 1.21.x | 不需要 | | Minecraft Ver. | Zarba Base | Zarba GUI | Zarba 3D | | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | 1.21.x | 可用 | 可用 | 可用 |

**献给喜欢使用 彩虹像素 的玩家**
# **怎么导入 Zarba 材质包** 1. 打开您的我的世界 2. 单击`选项` 3. 单击`资源包` 4. 将 Zarba 材质包拖入窗口或者单击`打开包文件夹`并将 Zarba 材质包复制到该文件夹 **备注** 1. 他们已在 [Zecoar Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zecoar-modpack) [(EX)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zecoar-modpack-ex) 中可用 2. Zarba Base需要Optifine, 如果您正在使用Fabric请安装Optifabric或者其他可以替代Optifabric的模组
